mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM goods WHERE status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(quantity), 0) FROM records WHERE type = 1 AND DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(quantity), 0) FROM records WHERE type = 2 AND DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inventory i JOIN goods g ON i.goods_id = g.id WHERE i.quantity < g.min_stock AND g.is_deleted = 0
